  • Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.structures.rings used by org.jscience.client.client.technical.backend.math
    Class
    Description
    Field
    A field is a commutative ring where every non-zero element has a multiplicative inverse.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.structures.rings used by org.jscience.core
    Class
    Description
    Ring
    A ring is an abelian group with a second binary operation (multiplication).
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.structures.rings used by org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra
    Class
    Description
    Ring
    A ring is an abelian group with a second binary operation (multiplication).
    Semiring
    A semiring (or rig) is an algebraic structure similar to a ring, but without the requirement that each element must have an additive inverse.
  • Classes in org.jscience.core.mathematics.structures.rings used by org.jscience.core.mathematics.algebra.algebras
    Class
    Description

    Semiring
